definition: The contact-event as it comes together in a specific sense process.
notes: Use this supporting record when the contact event is named with the conjunctive sam- form or when the family behind the six sense-door contact compounds needs a shared label. Keep it aligned with the governing phassa entry and distinct from the feeling that follows.

example_phrases.notes: Shows the contact-event in a specific sense-door compound.
Shows the same contact-event at the mind-field interface.
